conventions.name: react-components
conventions.description: PascalCase React components in components/ match file basename (function or class export)

conventions.name: error-boundary-class
conventions.description: React error boundaries require a class component (getDerivedStateFromError / componentDidCatch), so ErrorBoundary.tsx is the only class component in the tree; all other components are functional.

conventions.name: hooks
conventions.description: Hooks are named use* and exported from hooks/
